author: Marcus Breiden
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Versioned vault backups to Dropbox with content-addressed storage, hierarchical retention, and file-level restore.

manifest.description: Versioned vault backups to Dropbox with content-addressed storage, hierarchical retention, and file-level restore.

releases.author: MMoMM-org
releases.description:
Initial release of Archivist — versioned Obsidian vault backups to Dropbox.

**Features:**
- Content-addressed storage with SHA-256 dedup
- Hierarchical retention (full + incremental backups)
- File-level restore via right-click in file menu
- Directory restore + per-file FileVersionsView
- Live tooltip with next-backup countdown

Anchors semantic-release in the 0.x line — subsequent releases run via the Release workflow on push to main.
